name: lucid-logs
description: Feed your recent logs to an AI: de-noised, redacted, token-budgeted — one command. Works in VS Code and Cursor.

commands.title: Lucid: Feed recent logs to AI

lucid.command.description: The loglucid CLI command. If it isn't on PATH, set an absolute path (or use a wrapper like 'python -m loglucid.cli').

lucid.maxTokens.description: Token budget for the packed log block.

lucid.last.description: How many recent log lines to consider.

lucid.redact.description: Redact secrets/PII before the logs leave your machine (recommended).
